CreateBlbSslListener.clientToken: Idempotency token, maximum length of 64 characters
CreateBlbSslListener.listenerPort: Listening port of the listener, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
CreateBlbSslListener.backendPort: Listening port of the backend server, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
CreateBlbSslListener.scheduler: Load balancing algorithm, supports three modes: "RoundRobin" (weighted round robin) / "LeastConnection" (least connections) / "Hash" (source IP hash)
CreateBlbSslListener.healthCheckType: Health check protocol type, default is "TCP"
CreateBlbSslListener.serverTimeout: Maximum timeout for backend servers (in seconds), default is 900, must be an integer between 10 and 4000
CreateBlbSslListener.healthCheckTimeoutInSecond: Health check timeout (in seconds), default is 3, must be an integer between 1 and 60
CreateBlbSslListener.healthCheckInterval: Health check interval (in seconds), default is 3, must be an integer between 1 and 10
CreateBlbSslListener.unhealthyThreshold: Unhealthy threshold: number of consecutive health check failures before the backend server is blocked, default is 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
CreateBlbSslListener.healthyThreshold: Healthy threshold: number of consecutive health check successes before the backend server is marked available again, default is 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
CreateBlbSslListener.certIds: Certificate chain to be loaded by the listener; only one certificate ID is allowed; if multiple are provided, only the last one takes effect
CreateBlbSslListener.encryptionType: Encryption policy, default is tls_cipher_policy_default; supported values: tls_cipher_policy_default / tls_cipher_policy_1_1 / tls_cipher_policy_1_2 / tls_cipher_policy_1_2_secure / userDefind; refer to [encryption](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/BLB/s/Pjwvxnxdm#encryption) for corresponding protocols and cipher suites
CreateBlbSslListener.encryptionProtocols: When encryptionType is userDefind, a list of protocol types composed of combinations of "tlsv10", "tlsv11", and "tlsv12"
CreateBlbSslListener.appliedCiphers: Cipher suites as described in [encryption](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/BLB/s/Pjwvxnxdm#encryption); multiple cipher suites are separated by a colon ":"
CreateBlbSslListener.dualAuth: Whether to enable mutual (two-way) authentication, disabled by default
CreateBlbSslListener.clientCertIds: When dualAuth is true, the client certificate chain to be loaded; only one certificate ID is allowed; if multiple are provided, only the last one takes effect
